# lookdev

> lookdev is a Claude Code skill: a live human-in-the-loop web studio to tune AI-generated output by eye, then bake the chosen state into reproducible assets.

## Install (Claude Code)
- Add the marketplace: `/plugin marketplace add connerkward/ckw-skills`
- Install this plugin: `/plugin install lookdev@connerkward`

## Links
- Canonical README: https://github.com/connerkward/lookdev-studio-skill
- Marketplace (all of Conner K. Ward's skills + MCP servers): https://github.com/connerkward/ckw-skills

## Optional
- Author: Conner K. Ward — https://github.com/connerkward
